# Copilot Instructions

Load the following skills when working in this repository.

## Skills

- .github/skills/skills-index.md

## Context

This repository is a Java Spring Boot backend service.

Load all the skills in the skills index to ensure that you generate code that follows best practices for Java Spring Boot development, including clean code principles, proper architecture, REST API design, data access with Spring Data JPA, DTO mapping, exception handling, logging, validation, testing (both unit and integration), and dockerization.

Always follow these skills when generating code.
